description: Required terminal result for every agent, helper, verifier, or script job.

personaDispatchPlan.description: Oscar lead result coverage for required personas: atom, requiredPersona, routeAvailable, dispatchStatus, and evidenceExpected. routeAvailable is a JSON boolean, not yes/no text.

addresses.description: Explicit finding strings this result resolves for route-owned supersession validation.

founderAcceptance.description: Founder authorization evidence that may authorize a supersession record when route policy alone does not.

continuation.description: Machine-readable one-hop continuation request consumed by finalize-run-status when process-continuation is enabled. For unattended continuation use action=launch-fresh-run, prioritySlug, routeId, nextAtom, reason, and requiresFounder=false. Do not use continuation for teardown; stopping panes requires explicit founder kill/teardown approval.

rules: Verifier jobs cannot report filesChanged except none.
CONDITIONAL_PASS must list conditions in residualRisk or findings.
A founderAcceptance block alone does not supersede another lane; an immutable supersession record must cite it.
Oscar PASS results must include personaDispatchPlan rows and may not report packet-only, deferred, unavailable, or blocked required-persona work as complete.
Continuation is optional. If present, it is an executable control-plane request, not prose; founder-gated or ambiguous continuation must set requiresFounder=true or omit continuation.
